title: To A Child At Christmas Time.
content:
May the day that gave Christ birth
        Bring you boundless joy and mirth,
     Fill the golden hours with gladness,
        Raise no thought to cause you sadness.
meaning:
Edwin C. Ranck's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To A Child At Christmas Time."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
